attacks.name: Earthquake
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Sleepy Song
attacks.effect: Each Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Do the Wave
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Special Formula
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep and Poisoned. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Steel Wave
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon of the same type as the Defending Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Tonnage
attacks.effect: You may do 60 damage plus 20 more damage. If you do, Regirock ex does 30 damage to itself.

rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Freeze Lock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent can't attach Energy cards from his or her hand to the Defending Pokémon during his or her next turn.

rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Intense Glare
attacks.effect: Switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with 1 of the Defending Pokémon. Your opponent chooses the Defending Pokémon to switch. The new Defending Pokémon is now Burned and Confused.

attacks.name: Fire Blast
attacks.effect: Discard a Fire Energy attached to Ninetales ex.

rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Metal Reversal
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, you may choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch it with 1 of the Defending Pokémon. Your opponent chooses the Defending Pokémon to switch. If you do, this attack does 40 damage to the new Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Extra Comet Punch
attacks.effect: During your next turn, Extra Comet Punch does 50 damage plus 50 more damage.

rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Water Arrow
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Super Tidal Wave
attacks.effect: You may show your hand to your opponent. If you do, this attack does 50 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy card in your hand. After doing damage, shuffle the Energy cards back into your deck.

rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Rock Tumble
attacks.effect: This attack's damage is not affected by Resistance.

attacks.name: Crushing Mantle
attacks.effect: You may discard from your hand as many Energy cards as you like. If you do, this attack does 50 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy card you discarded.

rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Draw a number of cards up to the number of your opponent's Pokémon in play.

If you have more than 7 cards (including this one) in your hand, you can't play this card.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.

Any damage done by attacks from Psychic Pokémon and Fighting Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) is not affected by Resistance.
Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of your Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex). Remove all Special Conditions and 6 damage counters from that Pokémon (all if there are less than 6).

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.

Whenever any player attaches an Energy card from his or her hand to Water Pokémon, Fighting Pokémon, or Metal Pokémon, remove any Special Conditions from that Pokémon.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.

At any time between turns, each player puts 1 damage counter on his or her Pokémon-ex with maximum HP of at least 100.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.

Don't apply Weakness for all Pokémon in play (excluding Pokémon-ex and Pokémon that has an owner in its name).

attacks.name: Steel Generator
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon has a Poké-Power or Poké-Body, choose up to 2 basic Energy cards attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon and attach them to the Defending Pokémon.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Evolved Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex and Pokémon that has an owner in its name) in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Ancient Technical Machine [Steel].

attacks.name: Stone Generator
attacks.effect: If your opponent has any Evolved Pokémon in play, remove the highest Stage Evolution card from each of them and put those cards back into his or her hand.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Evolved Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex and Pokémon that has an owner in its name) in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Ancient Technical Machine [Rock].

attacks.name: Ice Generator
attacks.effect: Discard all of your opponent's Trainer cards in play. If you do, prevent all effects, including damage, done to the Pokémon using this attack during your opponent's next turn.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Evolved Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex and Pokémon that has an owner in its name) in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Ancient Technical Machine [Ice].
